pairs.key: This command can only be ran as a player.
pairs.value: 此命令只能由玩家執行。

pairs.key: You are not eligible for a starter kit.
pairs.value: 你沒有資格領取新手禮包。

pairs.key: Something went wrong while choosing your starter kit.
pairs.value: 選擇你的新手禮包時出了點問題。

pairs.key: Moved all kits to the inactive folder.
pairs.value: 已將所有套件移至未啟用資料夾。

pairs.key: Moved all kits to the active folder.
pairs.value: 已將所有套件移至活動資料夾。

pairs.key: One kit is given randomly on join.
pairs.value: 加入時會隨機獲得一個套件。

pairs.key: Players can choose one of the kits on join.
pairs.value: 玩家加入時可以選擇其中一套裝備。
> 如果再新增 2 個套件。

pairs.key: All active kits have been reloaded.
pairs.value: 所有啟用的套件均已重新載入。

pairs.key: Starter Kit tracking data has been reset. All players will now again receive a kit on join.
pairs.value: 新手禮包追蹤資料已重置。現在所有玩家再次加入時都會收到一個禮包。

pairs.key: You do not have permission to use that command.
pairs.value: 你沒有許可權使用該命令。

pairs.key: Adds your current inventory to the active kits.
pairs.value: 將你當前的物品欄新增到已啟用的工具包中。

pairs.key: Sets your current inventory as the only active kit.
pairs.value: 將你當前的物品欄設為唯一啟用的套件。

pairs.key: Give a player a random (or specific) starter kit.
pairs.value: 給予玩家一個隨機（或指定的）新手禮包。

pairs.key: Moves kit_name or all kits from inactive to active.
pairs.value: 將 kit_name 或所有套件從未啟用移至啟用狀態。

pairs.key: Moves kit_name or all kits from active to inactive.
pairs.value: 將 kit_name 或所有套件從啟用狀態移至未啟用狀態。
列出所有已啟用（或未啟用）的套件。

pairs.key: Resets all tracking. Players receive another kit on join.
pairs.value: 重置所有追蹤。玩家加入時會再次獲得一個套件。

pairs.key: Reloads starter kit changes from the config folder.
pairs.value: 從配置資料夾重新載入新手禮包的更改。

pairs.key: Allows players to choose a starter kit via commands. This is only needed when Starter Kit is not installed on the client and the server enabled kit choices.
pairs.value: 允許玩家通過命令選擇新手禮包。僅當客戶端未安裝 Starter Kit 且伺服器啟用了禮包選擇時，才需要此功能。

pairs.key: Shows the description and items of kit_name.
pairs.value: 顯示 kit_name 的描述和物品。

pairs.key: If you'd like to specify the kit name, use:
pairs.value: 如果你想指定套件名稱，請使用：

pairs.key: > If 1 more kit is added. For now all players will receive the '
pairs.value: > 若再新增 1 個套件，目前所有玩家都將直接獲得“

pairs.key: has been given the choice for a new starter kit!
pairs.value: 已獲得新手禮包選擇機會！

pairs.key: ' has been moved to the active folder.
' has been moved to the inactive folder.
